creator: mi@www.video-collage.com
text:
The source for http-analyze2.01 is on ftp://ftp.rent-a-guru.de/pub
	since Mar 19, 1998 (my birthday!). The reason I set severity
	to ``serious'' is in the fact that there is no 1.9e source
	on the ftp://ftp.rent-a-guru.de/pub any longer.

Fix: 

Look at the http-analyze-2.01-port-linted-clean.tar.gz in
	the incoming.  (Kindly remove two others. Sorry for the
	mess).
